{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sector 98
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pariana]] served in [[Sector 98]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
